mapper.insert: insert into multimodal_record (session_id, user_id, modality, status, audio_url, video_url, transcript, visual_result, code_language, code_content, compile_output, run_output, suggestion) values (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{modality}, #{status}, #{audioUrl}, #{videoUrl}, #{transcript}, #{visualResult}, #{codeLanguage}, #{codeContent}, #{compileOutput}, #{runOutput}, #{suggestion})
mapper.select: select id, session_id, user_id, modality, status, audio_url, video_url, transcript, visual_result, code_language, code_content, compile_output, run_output, suggestion, created_at, updated_at from multimodal_record where id = #{id}

select id, session_id, user_id, modality, status, audio_url, video_url, transcript, visual_result, code_language, code_content, compile_output, run_output, suggestion, created_at, updated_at from multimodal_record where session_id = #{sessionId} and user_id = #{userId} order by created_at asc, id asc
